findings_details.title: GitHub issue shorthand instead of full URLs in INTELLIJ MODULE EXCLUSIONS comment
findings_details.body: Lines 21-22 reference 'arqu-co/geo-risk-service#217 / arqu-co/issues#7597' as bare shorthand. Evidence: 'See arqu-co/geo-risk-service#217 / arqu-co/issues#7597 and JetBrains guidance...'. The repo's documentation convention (and the paired README section at README.md:55-59, which uses full JetBrains URL) is to use clickable URLs. Shorthand is not a URL — it will not resolve in terminal output, PR comment previews, or IDE hover. Fix: replace with 'https://github.com/arqu-co/geo-risk-service/issues/217' and 'https://github.com/arqu-co/issues/issues/7597' (or equivalent PR URLs). This is a 3-line comment so the longer URLs will stretch it by ~40 chars but the separator is 140 chars wide — still fits within line budget.

findings_details.title: excludeDirs API style diverges from sibling build files (addAll(listOf(...)) vs .add())
